subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-20
subcodes.first_line: The materialists hold to the opinion that the world of nature is complete. The divine philosophers declare
subcodes.subjects: @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @spiritual transformation, @man's distinction from the animal, @second birth, @Manifestation of God as educator, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @education and the development of capacity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @perfection; imperfection of nature
